findings.title: Equity V2 economic plausibility breached despite reported PASS
findings.detail: V2 final equity ~183x while baseline ~2.385x; major driver is net sells +117.3 notional with CDI accruing over inflated cash.

findings.title: Executor ledger lacks inventory dimensions (ticker/qty), preventing asset-level sell feasibility checks
findings.detail: Without ticker/qty in ledger_v2, SELL constraints cannot be validated by position, enabling economically inconsistent cash generation.

findings.title: CDI accumulated vs daily confusion occurred in gate logic and was patched
findings.detail: SSOT contains both index level and daily return. Using index directly as daily rate is wrong; current runner patch converts index-like series via pct_change where needed.

findings.title: Reported PASS statuses are internally consistent but not sufficient for economic validity
findings.detail: Reconciliations pass mathematically inside the implemented model, yet model assumptions allow implausible outcomes.
